story.iWant: clear visual feedback and progress indicators throughout my session
story.soThat: I stay motivated and know how much I've completed
story.tasks: - Build SessionProgressBar component (shows "Drill X of Y", horizontal progress bar with coral color, animated fill, positioned at top) - Build DrillTransition component (appears between drills for 0.5s, shows next drill type icon + name, fade animations) - Build SessionFeedback component (correct/incorrect feedback with animations, streak counter, success sound) - Build PauseButton with pause modal (pause/resume/end session options, shows current progress) - Ensure all components use Tailwind classes - Implement animations with prefers-reduced-motion support - Implement Web Audio API sound effects respecting UserSettingsContext.soundEnabled

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
**Given** all three drill types are implemented (Story 3.4 complete) **When** I am in an active training session **Then** the following UI components are operational:
**SessionProgressBar** (src/features/training/components/SessionProgressBar.tsx): - Shows "Drill X of Y" text (e.g., "Drill 3 of 12") - Horizontal progress bar (0-100% filled, coral primary color) - Animated fill as drills complete (Framer Motion transition) - Positioned at top of training session view
**DrillTransition** (src/features/training/components/DrillTransition.tsx): - Appears between drills for 0.5 seconds - Shows next drill type icon + name: 📏 "Number Line", 🔄 "Spatial Rotation", ➕ "Math Operations" - Subtle fade-in/fade-out animation - Prevents jarring instant switches between drill types
**SessionFeedback** (src/features/training/components/SessionFeedback.tsx): - Correct answer feedback: Green checkmark ✓, "+1" floating animation - Incorrect answer feedback: Red X ✗, show correct answer text - Streak counter mini-animation: Flame 🔥 pulses when drill correct - Success sound (if sound enabled in UserSettingsContext)
**PauseButton** (in session header): - Icon button (⏸ pause symbol, 44px tap target) - Opens pause modal with options: "Resume" (coral button), "End Session Early" (gray button, shows confirmation) - Shows current progress: "7 of 12 drills complete"
**And** All components use Tailwind classes, no inline styles **And** All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion media query **And** Sound effects use Web Audio API, respect UserSettingsContext.soundEnabled

doc.title: Epic 3: Training & Drill Engine Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Defines SessionProgressBar (shows "Drill X of Y", horizontal progress bar, coral color, animated fill), DrillTransition (0.5s transition between drills with icons), SessionFeedback (correct/incorrect feedback with animations, streak counter), and PauseButton with pause modal functionality.

doc.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: SessionContext extended with training-specific state (sessionType, drillQueue, currentDrillIndex, results). UserSettingsContext provides soundEnabled and reducedMotion preferences.

doc.title: System Architecture
doc.snippet: Uses shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS v4 for mobile-first design. Framer Motion for animations with prefers-reduced-motion support. Feature-based architecture with components in src/features/training/components/.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS v4 selected for mobile-first responsive design, lightweight performance, and full customization. Headspace-inspired warm colors (coral primary), rounded aesthetic, celebratory animations for progress.

artifact.reason: Main training session container - will integrate the new UI components (SessionProgressBar, DrillTransition, SessionFeedback, PauseButton)
Provides session state (sessionStatus, drillQueue, currentDrillIndex, results) needed by progress bar and pause button
Provides soundEnabled and reducedMotion preferences for SessionFeedback component
Example drill component showing DrillProps pattern and onComplete callback
Example drill component with visual feedback implementation pattern
shadcn/ui Progress component to be used in SessionProgressBar for horizontal progress bar
shadcn/ui Button component for pause button and modal actions

node.react: UI framework with hooks and concurrent rendering
node.framer-motion: Animations for transitions, feedback, progress bar fills
node.lucide-react: Icons for pause button and drill type icons
node.tailwindcss: CSS framework for styling (mobile-first, coral primary color)

story-context.constraints: - All components MUST use Tailwind CSS classes only - no inline styles - All animations MUST respect prefers-reduced-motion media query (use Framer Motion's reduced motion support) - Sound effects MUST use Web Audio API and respect UserSettingsContext.soundEnabled - Pause button tap target MUST be minimum 44px for accessibility - Progress bar MUST use coral primary color from design system - DrillTransition MUST be 0.5 seconds duration - SessionFeedback MUST auto-advance after 1.5 seconds (consistent with existing drills) - Components MUST be located in src/features/training/components/ - Sound files MUST be stored in public/sounds/ and be less than 50KB each - Components MUST integrate with existing SessionContext state (drillQueue, currentDrillIndex, sessionStatus)

interface.name: SessionFeedbackProps
interface.signature: { isCorrect: boolean; correctAnswer?: string | number; showStreakPulse?: boolean }

interface.name: SessionContext State Shape
interface.signature: { sessionStatus: 'idle' | 'active' | 'completed'; drillQueue: string[]; currentDrillIndex: number; results: DrillResult[] }

tests.standards: Use Vitest with React Testing Library for unit/integration tests. Use Playwright for E2E tests. Test files colocated with components (.test.tsx). Mock Framer Motion animations in tests. Use fake-indexeddb for Dexie mocking. Verify accessibility (ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, 44px tap targets). Test both sound-enabled and sound-disabled modes. Test reduced-motion preferences.
tests.ideas: - AC: SessionProgressBar renders "Drill X of Y" text and progress bar → Test: Render with currentIndex=3, totalDrills=12, verify text shows "Drill 3 of 12" and progress bar shows 25% (3/12) - AC: DrillTransition shows drill type icon and name for 0.5s → Test: Render with nextDrillType='number_line', verify icon 📏 and text "Number Line" appear, disappear after 500ms - AC: SessionFeedback shows green checkmark for correct answers → Test: Render with isCorrect=true, verify green checkmark ✓ and "+1" animation appear - AC: SessionFeedback shows red X and correct answer for incorrect → Test: Render with isCorrect=false, correctAnswer=42, verify red X ✗ and "42" text appear - AC: PauseButton opens pause modal with Resume/End options → Test: Click pause button, verify modal opens with "Resume" and "End Session Early" buttons - AC: All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion → Test: Set prefers-reduced-motion: reduce, verify animations are disabled or simplified - AC: Sound effects respect UserSettingsContext.soundEnabled → Test: Render SessionFeedback with soundEnabled=false, verify no audio plays - E2E: Complete training session with all UI components → Test: Start session, verify progress bar updates after each drill, verify transitions between drills, verify feedback after answers, pause and resume session
